entity.label: Immer
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The head of the sixteenth priestly order (1 Chr. 24:14).

nodes.label: Immer
nodes.description: The head of the sixteenth priestly order (1 Chr. 24:14).

verses.text: The fifteenth to Bilgah, the sixteenth to Immer,
The children of Immer, a thousand fifty and two.
And of the sons of Immer; Hanani, and Zebadiah.
The children of Immer, a thousand fifty and two.
Now Pashur the son of Immer the priest, who was also chief governor in the house of the LORD, heard that Jeremiah prophesied these things.
